name: lkhu
description: lkhu (Like Human) — an MCP plugin marketplace that gives Claude Code memory that works like the human brain

plugins.name: lkhu
plugins.description: Registers automatic recall/save hooks (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, Stop) and the lkhu latent-vector memory MCP server. Prerequisite: the lkhu console command on PATH (pipx install lkhu).
